hooks.command: CMD=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | head -1); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^\s*rm\s+.*-[a-zA-Z]*r[a-zA-Z]*f|^\s*rm\s+.*-[a-zA-Z]*f[a-zA-Z]*r'; then echo 'BLOCKED: rm -rf'; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^\s*git\s+push\s+.*--force|^\s*git\s+push\s+-f'; then echo 'BLOCKED: git push --force'; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^\s*git\s+reset\s+--hard'; then echo 'BLOCKED: git reset --hard'; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^\s*git\s+clean\s+.*-[a-zA-Z]*f'; then echo 'BLOCKED: git clean -f'; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^\s*(npm|pnpm)\s+publish'; then echo 'BLOCKED: npm/pnpm publish (CI only, see ADR-007)'; exit 2; fi
[ "$DEVELOP_SUBAGENT" = "1" ] && exit 0; OUT=$({ pnpm lint && pnpm build; } 2>&1); [ $? -eq 0 ] || { echo '[stop-hook] pnpm lint/build FAILED'; echo "$OUT"; exit 1; }

[ "$DEVELOP_SUBAGENT" = "1" ] && exit 0; CHANGES=$({ git diff --name-only HEAD~1 HEAD; git diff --name-only; git diff --cached --name-only; } 2>/dev/null | sort -u); if echo "$CHANGES" | grep -qE '^src/core/(rules/|engine/scoring)'; then printf '%s\n' '{"systemMessage": "[rule-docs reminder] Rule/scoring files changed. Rule-Reference wiki auto-syncs via sync-rule-docs PostToolUse hook. Check Scoring-Model wiki page (manual) and ADR if scoring philosophy changed."}'; fi; exit 0
